title: aegilops geniculata subsp. globulosa
intro: Aegilops geniculata subsp. globulosa, also known as the globular goat's grass, is a subspecies of the Aegilops geniculata species, a type of wild grass native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aegilops geniculata subsp. globulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to support the immune system. Aegilops geniculata subsp. globulosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
